source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国籍数学家首次获得菲尔兹奖
topics.official_english: Chinese Mathematicians Win Fields Medal for First Time
topics.why_hot: Historic achievement: Chinese mathematicians Wang Hong and Deng Yu jointly awarded the Fields Medal, a first for China.
topics.share_angle: Explain the significance of the Fields Medal and the inspiring stories of the winners.

topics.chinese_topic: 推进基础教育扩优提质
topics.official_english: China to Expand and Improve Basic Education
topics.why_hot: Government policy announcement on improving basic education quality and equity.
topics.share_angle: Break down the key measures and their potential impact on students and families.

topics.chinese_topic: 未来5年我们的出行将有新变化
topics.official_english: Transportation Changes Expected in Next Five Years
topics.why_hot: New transportation development plan affecting daily commute and travel.
topics.share_angle: Highlight upcoming innovations in public transit, EV infrastructure, and smart roads.

topics.official_english: Multiple Regions Offer Cash Incentives for Marriage
topics.why_hot: Local governments introduce marriage subsidies to boost birth rates.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the policy rationale and public reactions to financial incentives for marriage.

topics.chinese_topic: 净网：网警发20起涉汛涉灾谣言案例
topics.official_english: Cyber Police Release 20 Cases of Flood-Related Rumors
topics.why_hot: Authorities crack down on disaster misinformation during flood season.
topics.share_angle: Explain how to identify fake news and the legal consequences of spreading rumors.

topics.official_english: Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security Discloses Social Security Fund Details
topics.why_hot: Transparency report on China's social security fund balance and sustainability.
topics.share_angle: Summarize key figures and what they mean for pension and healthcare benefits.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国男足身陷 “死亡之组”
topics.official_english: Chinese Men's Football Team Lands in 'Group of Death'
topics.why_hot: World Cup qualifying draw places China in a tough group.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the group opponents and China's chances of advancing.

topics.chinese_topic: 韩国赠还中国一对清代石狮
topics.official_english: South Korea Returns Pair of Qing Dynasty Stone Lions to China
topics.why_hot: Cultural repatriation event strengthens bilateral ties.
topics.share_angle: Tell the story of the stone lions and the significance of cultural heritage return.
